CreateIpv6Gateway.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
CreateIpv6Gateway.name: The name of the IPv6 gateway
CreateIpv6Gateway.bandwidthInMbps: The bandwidth limit of the IPv6 gateway in Mbps
CreateIpv6Gateway.billing: Billing information. Only postpaid is currently supported
CreateIpv6Gateway.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing: Prepaid or Postpaid. Required when creating an order; not required for renewal orders
CreateIpv6Gateway.billing.reservation: Reservation information. Not required for postpaid; required for prepaid
CreateIpv6Gateway.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to be created
CreateIpv6Gateway.tags.tagKey: Tag key. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Length: 1–65
CreateIpv6Gateway.tags.tagValue: Tag value. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Length: 0–65
CreateIpv6Gateway.deleteProtect: Whether to enable deletion protection. Default is false, meaning deletion is allowed
